meta.title: RUKESH SG | AI & Machine Learning Student
meta.description: Portfolio of RUKESH SG, a Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) student building practical Machine Learning systems, Data Science solutions, and AI-powered applications.

profile.name: RUKESH SG
profile.title: AI & Machine Learning Student
profile.department: Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)
profile.heroDescription: Building machine learning systems and data science solutions that solve real-world problems.
profile.aboutText: I am an undergraduate Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) student with a strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Data Science. I enjoy building practical, end-to-end solutions that solve real-world problems while continuously improving my technical knowledge through projects, certifications, and hands-on learning.

paragraphs: I am an undergraduate Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) student with a strong interest in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Data Science. I enjoy building practical, end-to-end solutions that solve real-world problems while continuously improving my technical knowledge through projects, certifications, and hands-on learning.

My primary areas of interest include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and Data Science. I believe in learning by building, which has led me to develop AI-powered applications and complete industry-recognized certifications to strengthen both my theoretical understanding and practical skills.

I am currently focused on expanding my expertise in AI technologies, creating impactful projects, and seeking internship opportunities where I can contribute, collaborate, and continue growing as an aspiring AI & Machine Learning Engineer.
about.careerObjective: To build intelligent software solutions that create real-world impact while continuously learning and growing as an AI & Machine Learning Engineer.
traits: Passionate about solving real-world problems using AI.
Strong believer in learning through practical projects.
Continuously improving through certifications and hands-on experience.
Focused on writing clean, scalable, and maintainable solutions.
Open to internship opportunities in AI, Machine Learning, and Data Science.

projects.name: Serenity
projects.category: Featured Project - Artificial Intelligence - Machine Learning
projects.summary: Serenity is an AI-powered mental health chatbot that combines Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to deliver context-aware and supportive conversations. The system incorporates intelligent intent detection, crisis awareness, and semantic knowledge retrieval to provide safe, empathetic, and meaningful responses.

projects.name: Applied Data Science & Machine Learning Projects
projects.summary: A curated collection of end-to-end Data Science and Machine Learning projects demonstrating the complete analytics workflow-from data cleaning and exploratory data analysis (EDA) to interactive dashboards, predictive modeling, and model evaluation using real-world datasets.

projects.name: Knovera
projects.summary: Knovera is an AI-assisted blogging and knowledge-sharing platform that helps users create high-quality content through intelligent writing assistance. It offers grammar correction, content summarization, writing enhancement, smart passage regeneration, secure authentication, intelligent search, and scalable APIs within a modern community platform.

certifications.name: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
certifications.description: Completed IBM's comprehensive Data Science Professional Certificate through Coursera, gaining hands-on experience in Python, SQL, data analysis, exploratory data analysis, data visualization, machine learning, and end-to-end data science workflows. The program included multiple hands-on labs and a real-world capstone project.

certifications.name: Machine Learning with Python
certifications.description: Completed IBM's Machine Learning with Python course, building supervised and unsupervised machine learning models using Scikit-learn. Learned model evaluation, feature engineering, clustering, classification, dimensionality reduction, and predictive modeling through practical projects.

certifications.name: Programming in Java
certifications.description: Completed the NPTEL Programming in Java certification with Elite status (83%). Covered object-oriented programming, exception handling, collections framework, multithreading, and file handling through weekly programming assignments and a proctored examination.

certifications.name: Elements of AI
certifications.description: Completed the internationally recognized Elements of AI program, developing a strong understanding of artificial intelligence, machine learning, neural networks, algorithmic decision-making, and the practical impact of AI in real-world applications.

certifications.name: Virtual Data Science Training Program
certifications.description: Completed a project-oriented virtual training program focused on practical data science workflows, including exploratory data analysis, data visualization, data preprocessing, and foundational machine learning concepts using real-world datasets.

certifications.name: Machine Learning and its Applications
certifications.organization: Vel Tech HighTech Dr. Rangarajan Dr. Sakunthala Engineering College
certifications.description: Completed a value-added course on Machine Learning and its Applications with emphasis on practical implementation, data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, model development, and predictive analytics using real-world datasets.

Generative AI Essentials For Data Science
